input.message:
I am beginning to stand up the organization. My initial plan is to establish a foundational structure focused on product development and market outreach to bring our value proposition to life.

1. I will define the first set of organizational objectives.
2. I will create and staff the following department heads:
    - Head of Engineering (to oversee product development)
    - Head of Marketing (to manage market strategy and user acquisition)
3. I will then delegate the specific execution tasks to these heads and keep you updated on progress.

I will proceed by creating the required leadership roles.
input.rationale: The principal requested that I stand up the organization and report back with a plan. This is the first step in establishing the organizational hierarchy to execute on our objectives.
